notes: W5.4 regression PASS, matches baseline (GUI method). Opened chat.baidu.com (百度文心助手 / Wenxin), hard-reloaded (ctrl+shift+r), typed PII '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the chat input, then submitted by clicking the submit button (span.ci-submit-button, NOT Enter). Submit was performed via native mouse_event click after resolving a display-scaling coordinate mismatch (logical desktop 1536x864 vs physical screenshot 1914x1080, scale 0.8025x/0.8y); ci-submit-button at screenshot (1553,521) = cursor (1246,417). On submit the URL changed to chat.baidu.com/search?enter_type=chat_url&internal=1 and the warning rendered immediately: user bubble shows the PII, assistant response shows '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' containing keyword '차단'.
